title: alyssum andinum
intro: Alyssum andinum, also known as Andean sweet alyssum, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Alyssum andinum include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
